"As you are all aware, Division
street Is one of the main thorough
fares of the city and the traffic will
increasely largely from year to
year. l recommend for your con-
sideration the following:


That the Oregon Railway &
Navigation company and the Spo-
kane & International railway de-
press their tracks as far as may
be practicable and that an over
head roadway be provided, begin
ing at point on Boone avenue and
at an elevation sufficient to leave
